title: xanthophyllum rufum
intro: Xanthophyllum rufum, a species of plant in the family Polygalaceae, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum rufum include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from pain and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Xanthophyllum rufum often involve drying the leaves and stems to create teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
